summary: Iteration 11: Backend APIs (5/5 passed) + Static code analysis (9/9 passed) verifying all 4 user-reported bug fixes for fullscreen player architecture. Fixed duplicate useState declarations in live.tsx.

frontend_issues.code_fix_applied: Fixed duplicate useState declarations for playerEpg and playerProgress at lines 57-58 and 67-68 in live.tsx. Removed duplicate lines 67-68.

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: live.tsx had duplicate useState declarations for playerEpg (lines 57 & 67) and playerProgress (lines 58 & 68). Removed duplicates.
live.tsx: VERIFIED - isFullscreen state and enterFullscreen/exitFullscreen functions exist
live.tsx: VERIFIED - Fullscreen uses same inlinePlayer (fs-video-player testID)
live.tsx: VERIFIED - All fullscreen controls present (fs-back-btn, fs-aspect-btn, fs-play-btn, fs-prev-btn, fs-next-btn, fs-fav-btn, fs-multiview-btn)
live.tsx: VERIFIED - Orientation listener uses unlockAsync() and handles LANDSCAPE→enterFullscreen, PORTRAIT→exitFullscreen
live.tsx: VERIFIED - BackHandler for Android back button returns true in fullscreen
live.tsx: VERIFIED - goFullscreen calls enterFullscreen (NOT router.push('/player'))
player.tsx: VERIFIED - multiview button pauses player before navigation (player.pause())
multiview.tsx: VERIFIED - 2x2 grid, category picker modal, volume-based audio routing (isActive?1:0)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 user-reported issues VERIFIED IMPLEMENTED: 1) Fullscreen from live screen uses SAME inlinePlayer (no restart/double audio). 2) Landscape rotation triggers enterFullscreen, portrait exits via exitFullscreen (bidirectional). 3) Home screen locked to portrait in tabs/_layout.tsx. 4) Multiview pauses previous player audio (player.pause() before navigation). Fixed duplicate useState bug in live.tsx. Backend APIs all working: /api/health, /api/live/categories, /api/live/streams, /api/stream/url. Metro bundler compiles successfully.

verified_features.feature: Fullscreen from live screen uses same player instance
verified_features.evidence: live.tsx uses same inlinePlayer for both inline and fullscreen VideoView components

verified_features.feature: Landscape rotation triggers fullscreen, portrait exits
verified_features.evidence: Orientation listener with unlockAsync(), LANDSCAPE_LEFT/RIGHT→enterFullscreen, PORTRAIT_UP→exitFullscreen
player.tsx and live.tsx both call player.pause() before router.push to /multiview
live.tsx goFullscreen() calls enterFullscreen(), router.push only used for /multiview
